title: 『オペレーション：オーダー遂行』

text_block_list.text:
One day, right when our training is winding
down...

I thought I could hang on until training was over,
but it doesn't look like that's going to be
possible.
choice_data_list:
Hey, head back after you've adequately cooled
down, okay?

Hey, head back after you've adequately cooled
down, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood, Trainer.

Reassured by her firm reply, I quickly head to the
restroom.

An hour later, my stomach issues have passed,
but I realize I forgot something at the field. I head
back for it, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Welcome back, Trainer.
Mihono Bourbon is still cooling down.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Your words implied that I should cool down
until my heart rate returned to a normal level.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You used the term "adequately." That is an
adverb that means "sufficiently—not excessively."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I have been waiting here for my heart
rate to sufficiently return to so-called "resting"
levels...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am jogging and walking as part of my cooldown
routine.

First of all, her heart rate's not going to get to
resting levels if she keeps jogging...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Measuring heart rate... Forty beats per minute
above "resting" rate... Continuing cooldown.

After stopping Mihono Bourbon from continuing
her "cool down," I make a note to be clearer with
my instructions in the future. A few days later...

Right when our training is winding down, I receive
a message from Director Akikawa.

"Attention all trainers! Emergency meeting at
once!"

I'm still concerned about Mihono Bourbon's last
misstep, but when Director Akikawa says to meet,
she means without delay.
choice_data_list:
(I'll just give instructions with concrete numbers
this time!)

(I'll just give instructions with concrete numbers
this time!)

text_block_list.text: I leave her a light training regimen with very specific numbers and leave the gym.

The next morning, I go to the gym to check on
our training equipment...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. My training will end in
precisely four minutes and two seconds.
choice_data_list: Why on earth are you still training?!
Why on earth are you still training?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Last night, my training equipment was damaged.
My attempts at repair were futile, as my database
lacks any suitable methods...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I requested assistance with repairs from the
custodian at 8:00 a.m. this morning. I was finally
able to resume training a short time ago.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

Resisting the urge to faint, I explain clearly that
it's okay for her to go home when something like
that happens, and send her back to her dorm.

I make that pledge to myself, and then a few
more days later...

Right when our training is winding down, I get a
message that a bird slammed into my office
window and shattered it!
I'm still worried about the last two blunders with Bourbon, but... I've got to clean up the glass before anyone gets hurt.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong, Trainer?

I summarize the situation for her and give her
instructions to follow for the remainder of her
training session.
choice_data_list:
Two laps running around the perimeter of the
academy!

One run-through of our strength training
regimen!

text_block_list.text:
I add that I want her to do a fifteen-minute
cooldown and then go home after she's finished.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Instructions acknowledged. Proceeding to the
academy perimeter.
Mihono Bourbon goes to the school gate.
choice_data_list: (I'll keep an eye on her for just little longer...)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Two laps around the academy perimeter
completed. Commencing cooldown.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Fifteen minutes have elapsed. Shifting to "go
home" phase. A job well done.

Mihono Bourbon follows my orders and heads
back to her dorm, just as I told her to!

Although there's glass scattered all over my office
floor, I'm in rather good spirits.

I add that I want her to be conscious of the
physical load she puts on each muscle as she
trains.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Instructions acknowledged. I will commence
strength training immediately.

I pray that things go well this time and hurry to
my office. On the way, another trainer I know
calls out to me.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Um, I just saw Mihono Bourbon with a whole
bunch of tires strapped to her... Is she okay?
I hurry back to find a wild scene.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Sufficient abdominal load confirmed. Resuming
strength training exercise one—"sit-ups."

Sporting a serious expression, Mihono Bourbon
continues her sit-ups with a huge number of tires
strapped to her waist.
